title: She Knew Him When He Called Her Name
lede: Mary weeps at the empty tomb until the risen Jesus says one word — her name — and grief turns into recognition.

title: Blessed Are Your Eyes, Because They See
lede: Parables don't hide the truth so much as reveal it to a heart that's already leaning toward what's being shown.
liturgicalDay: Thursday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time

title: The Seed Doesn't Change. The Ground Does.
lede: The word is the same everywhere — what changes the harvest is the condition of the ground that receives it.
liturgicalDay: Friday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time

title: The Cup Before the Seat
lede: James and John's mother asks for the best seats in the Kingdom — Jesus answers with a question about a cup.

title: Worth Everything You Have
lede: Two short parables about the one discovery worth selling everything for.
